title: Fleet Snapshot
description: The fleet.json file published to gh-pages/public/ by dashboard-snapshot.yml. Consumed by the frontend (main.js) to render the dashboard.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this snapshot was built.

repos.description: Array of repo fleet entries, sorted alphabetically by repository. Failures are sorted first by the frontend, not here.

_source.description: Indicates whether this entry came from the branch-authoritative record ('branch') or the PR fallback ('pr'). Added by the snapshot step, not present in the raw run record.
